{{- /* layouts/partials/solid-color-image.html Usage: {{ $img := partial "solid-color-image.html" (dict "color" "3A5A8E" "width" 1200 "height" 630 "format" "png") }} Usage: {{ $img := partial "solid-color-image.html" (slice COLOR [WIDTH] [HEIGHT] [FORMAT]) }} Usage: {{ $img := partial "solid-color-image.html" COLOR }} 1x1 Usage: {{ $img := partial "solid-color-image.html" }} <- 1x1 white */ -}} {{ $c := math.Counter }} {{- $color := "FFFFFF" }} {{- $width := 1 }} {{- $height := 1 }} {{- $format := "png" }} {{ with . }} {{- if reflect.IsMap . }} {{- with .color }} {{ $color = . }}{{- end }} {{- if and .width .height }} {{- $width = .width }}{{- $height = .height }} {{- else if .width }} {{- $width = .width }}{{- $height = .height }} {{- else if .height }} {{- $height = .height }}{{- $width = .height }} {{- end }} {{- with .format }} {{ $format = . }}{{- end }} {{- else if reflect.IsSlice . }} {{ $len := len . }} {{ if gt $len 4 }}{{- errorf "solid-color.html: a maximum of 4 arguments are allowed" }}{{- end }} {{ if ge $len 1 }}{{- $color = index . 0 }}{{- end }} {{ if ge $len 2 }}{{- $width = index . 1 }}{{- $height = index . 1 -}}{{- end }} {{ if ge $len 3 }}{{- $height = index . 2 -}}{{- end }} {{ if eq $len 4 }}{{- $format = index . 3 }}{{- end }} {{- else if eq "string" (printf "%T" .) }} {{- $color = . }} {{- end }} {{- end }} {{- $img := "" }} {{- $color := strings.TrimPrefix "#" $color }} {{- if findRE `^[0-9a-fA-F]{6}$` $color 1 }} {{/* fixed 54-byte BMP header (file header + BITMAPINFOHEADER), 1x1px, 24bpp */}} {{ $header := "424d3a000000000000003600000028000000010000000100000001001800000000000400000000000000000000000000000000000000" }} {{ $r := substr $color 0 2 }} {{ $g := substr $color 2 2 }} {{ $b := substr $color 4 2 }} {{ $color = printf "%s%s%s00" $b $g $r }} {{ $bytes := encoding.HexDecode (print $header $color) }} {{ $img = resources.FromString (printf "img/og-text-%s.bmp" $color) $bytes }} {{ $img = $img.Resize (printf "%dx%d %s" $width $height $format) }} {{- else }} {{- errorf "solid-color.html: not a valid HEX color value %s" $color }} {{- end }} {{- warnf "RIK: [%2d] INPUT [ %s ] [ %d x %d ] [ %s ]" $c $color $width $height $format }} {{ return $img }}
